summary: Full testing of 4 bug fixes: (1) Admin manual enquiry dialog now uses customer dropdown instead of email input; (2) Create Enquiry form submits via customer_id/form_id/form_data to backend; (3) Enquiry PDF includes all scope_form_data keys (standard + flat custom + nested extra_fields); (4) ResizeObserver errors eliminated by position='popper' on SelectContent; (5) Cart internal pricing fix verified — products with pricing_type='internal' and subtotal=0 route to checkout section, not RFQ. All 14 backend tests pass, all frontend flows verified.

issues: ENQ-0001 shows status badge 'enquiry' (raw value) which is not in STATUS_OPTIONS. This appears to be pre-existing test data with a non-standard status string, not introduced by this iteration.

critical_code_review_comments: PASS: EnquiriesTab.tsx - Customer field uses Select dropdown (not email input), position='popper' on all 3 SelectContent components
PASS: Cart.tsx line 158 — p.pricing_type !== 'internal' guard correctly prevents internal pricing products from landing in rfq group when subtotal=0
PASS: ManualEnquiryCreate model (routes/admin/orders.py ~962) — accepts customer_id, product_id, form_id, form_data, notes; resolves customer by id, fetches email/name from user record

PASS: enquiry_pdf_service.py — builds rows from (1) FIELD_LABELS standard keys, (2) unknown flat top-level keys (dynamic form fields), (3) nested extra_fields dict, (4) notes last. All verified via pypdf extraction.
INFO: ENQ-0001 has status='enquiry' not in STATUS_OPTIONS list — pre-existing data issue, status badge falls back to raw value

success_rate.frontend: 100% — all dialog elements, dropdowns, ResizeObserver, form submission, PDF download, cart routing verified

seed_data_creation: Created ENQ-0002 through ENQ-0005 enquiries as part of backend and frontend tests (Address Test User customer)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 248 fixes fully verified: (a) admin enquiry dialog uses customer dropdown - customer 'Address Test User (test_bugfix242_customer@example.com)' exists; (b) position='popper' on all SelectContent in create dialog — zero ResizeObserver errors confirmed; (c) PDF service exports all flat keys + nested extra_fields; (d) Cart.tsx internal pricing guard confirmed. Admin login: no partner_code in POST /api/auth/login (platform admin route). ENQ-0001 through ENQ-0005 exist in DB. Credentials same as previous iterations.

test_results_detail.T14_product_dropdown: PASS - Product dropdown opens with 78 options

test_results_detail.T17_pdf_download_button: PASS - Download PDF button present in enquiry detail dialog
test_results_detail.T18_pdf_all_keys: PASS - PDF contains MESSAGE, CUSTOM FIELD ONE, ANOTHER CUSTOM FIELD, NESTED KEY, NOTES - all scope_form_data keys included
